data_description.username: The username to log in to the Milesight gateway.
data_description.password: The new password to log in to the Milesight gateway.
data_description.secret_key: The 16-character AES encryption key for the gateway password.
data_description.iv: The 16-character AES initialization vector for the gateway password.
data_description.gateway_mqtt_base_topic: The MQTT topic prefix for sensor uplink messages, for example `sensors/lora/uplink`.

reconfigure.description: Update the credentials for your Milesight gateway.
reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Milesight Gateway

data_description.gateway_url: The URL of your Milesight gateway, for example `https://192.168.2.180`.
data_description.port: The port of the gateway API.
data_description.username: The username to log in to the Milesight gateway.
data_description.password: The password to log in to the Milesight gateway.
data_description.secret_key: The 16-character AES encryption key for the gateway password.
data_description.iv: The 16-character AES initialization vector for the gateway password.
data_description.gateway_mqtt_base_topic: The MQTT topic prefix for sensor uplink messages, for example `sensors/lora/uplink`.

user.description: Enter the connection details for your Milesight gateway.
user.title: Configure Milesight Gateway

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the gateway for updated sensor data.
